title: Netherlands vs Sweden summary score, stats & goals | World Cup 2026 Group F
fetched: raw-HTML 直抓 + 抽取(html:paragraphs) + 清洗（逐字、未经任何模型/改写/翻译）
original_text:
The Netherlands trounced Sweden at NRG Stadium in Houston on Saturday June 20, in Match 35 of the 2026 World Cup.

Second Half ends, Netherlands 5, Sweden 1.

Attempt saved. Gustaf Lagerbielke (Sweden) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Elliot Stroud with a cross.

Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Virgil van Dijk.

Delay in match because of an injury Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands).

Substitution, Sweden. Elliot Stroud replaces Gabriel Gudmundsson.

Noa Lang (Netherlands) wins a free kick on the left wing.

Attempt blocked. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Taha Ali.

Lucas Bergvall (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Fourth official has announced 5 minutes of added time.

Substitution, Netherlands. Noa Lang replaces Cody Gakpo.

Goal! Netherlands 5, Sweden 1. Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) right footed shot from outside the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Memphis Depay.

Attempt saved. Besfort Zeneli (Sweden) left footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Gabriel Gudmundsson.

Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Bart Verbruggen.

Attempt saved. Alexander Isak (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the top right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Taha Ali.

Anthony Elanga (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Offside, Netherlands. Cody Gakpo is caught offside.

Lucas Bergvall (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Substitution, Sweden. Taha Ali replaces Yasin Ayari.

Memphis Depay (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Yasin Ayari (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Ryan Gravenberch (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Micky van de Ven (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Yasin Ayari (Sweden) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Substitution, Netherlands. Memphis Depay replaces Brian Brobbey.

Offside, Netherlands. Brian Brobbey is caught offside.

Isak Hien (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Victor Lindelöf.

Corner, Sweden. Conceded by Jan Paul van Hecke.

Substitution, Netherlands. Guus Til replaces Tijjani Reijnders.

Substitution, Netherlands. Teun Koopmeiners replaces Frenkie de Jong.

Goal! Netherlands 4, Sweden 1. Anthony Elanga (Sweden) left footed shot from the centre of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Alexander Isak with a through ball following a fast break.

Attempt missed. Ryan Gravenberch (Netherlands) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Brian Brobbey.

Attempt missed. Yasin Ayari (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is just a bit too high. Assisted by Lucas Bergvall.

Substitution, Sweden. Lucas Bergvall replaces Benjamin Nygren.

Substitution, Sweden. Besfort Zeneli replaces Jesper Karlström.

Substitution, Sweden. Anthony Elanga replaces Alexander Bernhardsson.

Goal! Netherlands 4, Sweden 0. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from the left side of the box to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Crysencio Summerville following a fast break.

Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden) is shown the yellow card for a bad foul.

Crysencio Summerville (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Attempt blocked. Yasin Ayari (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Jesper Karlström.

Attempt blocked. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from outside the box is blocked. Assisted by Brian Brobbey.

Goal! Netherlands 3, Sweden 0. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) left footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries with a cross.

Tijjani Reijnders (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Substitution, Netherlands. Crysencio Summerville replaces Donyell Malen.

Second Half begins Netherlands 2, Sweden 0.

First Half ends, Netherlands 2, Sweden 0.

Attempt saved. Yasin Ayari (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom left corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Viktor Gyökeres.

Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) wins a free kick on the right wing.

Attempt missed. Benjamin Nygren (Sweden) left footed shot from outside the box misses to the right.

Attempt saved. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands).

Fourth official has announced 4 minutes of added time.

Offside, Sweden. Gustaf Lagerbielke is caught offside.

Gabriel Gudmundsson (Sweden) wins a free kick on the left wing.

Attempt missed. Yasin Ayari (Sweden) right footed shot from outside the box is too high. Assisted by Alexander Isak.

Attempt saved. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) right footed shot from outside the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kristoffer Nordfeldt (Sweden). Assisted by Micky van de Ven.

Attempt saved. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the left side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Alexander Isak.

Attempt missed. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is close, but misses to the right. Assisted by Alexander Isak.

Attempt missed. Yasin Ayari (Sweden) right footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the right. Assisted by Viktor Gyökeres.

Attempt blocked. Jesper Karlström (Sweden) right footed shot from the centre of the box is blocked. Assisted by Isak Hien with a headed pass.

Alexander Bernhardsson (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Brian Brobbey (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Denzel Dumfries (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Frenkie de Jong (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Goal! Netherlands 2, Sweden 0. Brian Brobbey (Netherlands) right footed shot from very close range to the bottom left corner. Assisted by Denzel Dumfries with a cross.

Attempt missed. Tijjani Reijnders (Netherlands) left footed shot from the left side of the box misses to the left.

Offside, Netherlands. Tijjani Reijnders is caught offside.

Corner, Netherlands. Conceded by Alexander Bernhardsson.

Attempt saved. Cody Gakpo (Netherlands) header from the centre of the box is saved in the centre of the goal by Kristoffer Nordfeldt (Sweden). Assisted by Donyell Malen with a cross.

Tijjani Reijnders (Netherlands) wins a free kick in the attacking half.

Offside, Sweden. Alexander Isak is caught offside.

Attempt saved. Viktor Gyökeres (Sweden) right footed shot from the right side of the box is saved in the bottom right corner by Bart Verbruggen (Netherlands). Assisted by Alexander Bernhardsson.

Goal! Netherlands 1, Sweden 0. Brian Brobbey (Netherlands) right footed shot from very close range to the centre of the goal. Assisted by Cody Gakpo with a cross.

Offside, Sweden. Viktor Gyökeres is caught offside.

Alexander Isak (Sweden) wins a free kick in the defensive half.

Foul by Jan Paul van Hecke (Netherlands).

Lineups are announced and players are warming up.
